Risk Description: Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set allows XSS and data injection attacks across 5 endpoints
Evidence: CSP alert on GET https://demo.owasp-juice.shop CWE-693
Mitigation: Add Content-Security-Policy header; define allowed sources for scripts, styles, images

Risk Description: Cross-Domain Misconfiguration — overly permissive CORS policy allows unauthorized cross-origin requests
Mitigation: Restrict CORS to trusted origins; remove wildcard (*) Access-Control-Allow-Origin

Risk Description: Server Leaks Version Information via HTTP Server Response Header  technology stack disclosed
Mitigation: Configure server to suppress or mask the Server response header value

Risk Description: Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) Header Not Set allows protocol downgrade and MITM attacks
Evidence: HSTS alert on multiple endpoints CWE-319
Mitigation: Add Strict-Transport-Security header with max-age of at least 31536000 seconds

Risk Description: Timestamp Disclosure (Unix) — internal Unix timestamps exposed in HTTP responses
Mitigation: Strip Unix timestamps from HTTP responses; avoid including internal timing data

Risk Description: Cache-Control Directives Not Properly Configured sensitive content may be cached by browsers
Mitigation: Set Cache-Control: no-store / no-cache for authenticated or sensitive endpoints

Risk Description: Modern Web Application Framework Detected  SPA framework may expose client-side attack surface
Mitigation: Ensure client-side routing does not expose sensitive data; conduct SPA-specific security review
